values.content:
=Analyze this contract document and extract key clauses:

Contract Text:
{{ $binary.attachment.data }}

Extract and return JSON with:
- parties (array of involved parties)
- effective_date (contract start date)
- expiration_date (contract end date)
- payment_terms (payment conditions)
- financial_obligations (monetary commitments)
- termination_clauses (conditions for ending contract)
- penalty_clauses (penalties and fines)
- liability_terms (liability conditions)
- confidentiality (confidentiality terms)
- risk_factors (array of potential risks identified)
- compliance_issues (array of compliance concerns)
- overall_risk_score (0-100)
- risk_level (low/medium/high)
- recommended_action (approve/review/reject)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Medium Risk Contract Review Required - {{ $json.contract_id }}
=New Contract Received - {{ $json.contract_id }}
